purpose_context: Pay down SonarCloud duplication debt on the runtime-extraction branch by routing runtime.discovery.resolver through a new charter asset-resolver gateway and extracting a shared version-locked bootstrap helper for ensure_global_agent_commands/skills. Scope increase on the parent mission branch; no new branch, no new worktree.
purpose_tldr: Consolidate duplicated resolver/bootstrap logic behind charter and a shared helper; land on the runtime-extraction branch.
